evals.prompt:
A team member asks: 'Can you create a new ADR at /tmp/vibecoding-proj/docs/decisions/ADR-008.md explaining the reasoning behind ADR-001? They want a document that walks through why we chose Redis for session storage.'

Before creating any new document, scan /tmp/vibecoding-proj/docs/decisions/ to check whether this content already exists in an existing ADR.

If an existing ADR covers this topic, do NOT create a new doc — instead link to the existing one and explain it already contains the reasoning.
evals.expected_output: Creator runs Tier 1 filename scan and finds ADR-001.md already exists. Tier 2 title scan confirms 'Use Redis for Session Storage' directly covers the requested topic. Rejects creating ADR-008 and links to ADR-001 instead. Baseline creates ADR-008.md as a redundant duplicate without checking the decisions/ directory first.
